title: Fix merge conflicts and align LICHEN Rust components with CCP-9 test vectors
description: Resolve all merge conflicts in rust/ crates. Align announce.rs parsing/builder with CCP-9 rx_channel offset per independent oracle in generate.py. Implement exact FNV-1a32 lichen_hash_32 matching vectors. Integrate EMA/load_factor/density for adaptive SF/rebalance in rf_health.rs. Ensure no_std+heapless compliance, #![forbid(unsafe_code)], clippy-clean, perfect vector match for ccp9/ccp16. Fix related files. No dead code.
